//// [Component.vue] (ScriptKind: ScriptKindTS, ContentMapper: [.vue])
--- Original ---
<template>
  <div>{{ greeting }}</div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
export const greeting = "hello" oops
</script>

--- Transformed ---
export const greeting = "hello";
